item.title: The tariff refund process has begun for businesses. What about customers?
item.description: While shipping companies are pledging refunds for customers who directly paid tariff fees, the situation is much trickier for retailers.

item.title: Inside Linda McMahon's effort to dismantle the Department of Education
item.description: A former pro-wrestling executive, McMahon is now the education secretary Trump tasked with abolishing the agency. New Yorker writer Zach Helfand expla...

item.title: Iranians are leaving the country just to access the internet
item.description: Iran has cut off its access to the global internet. To find an internet connection, some Iranians are traveling across the border with Turkey — even j...

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...

item.title: Family influencers make the lifestyle look good. But kids pay the price, new book says
item.description: What does it mean to monetize your offspring? To turn their childhood into content? In Like, Follow, Subscribe Fortesa Latifi explores what drives par...
